category_sources: Official kernel.org release directory and upstream repository identify usbutils as Linux USB utilities.
source_facts.description says usbutils lists detailed information about USB devices.
display_name_sources: Official kernel.org repository path and release directory use usbutils.
docs_sources: Official kernel.org git repository is the best available source documentation surface for usbutils.
source_facts.homepage points to linux-usb.org as the project homepage.
repo_sources: Official kernel.org repository URL is identified as the upstream source-control repository for usbutils.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies detailed USB device inspection.
source_facts.executables includes usbhid-dump, and usbutils is commonly associated with lsusb-style USB device tooling.
